languages.text: "Благодарю за то, что вразумили моего коллегу, Лорд-капитан. Мы отправим этого человека туда, откуда его забрали техножрецы, и изымем аугмент, когда тому придет время".
"Thank you for talking some sense into my colleague, Lord Captain. We will send this man back to where the Tech-Priests found him and retrieve the augment when the time comes."
languages.original_text: "Благодарю за то, что вразумили моего коллегу, Лорд-капитан. Мы отправим этого человека туда, откуда его забрали техножрецы, и изымем аугмент, когда тому придет время".

traits.locale_text: "Thank you for talking some sense into my colleague, Lord Captain. We will send this man back to where the Tech-Priests found him and retrieve the augment when the time comes."
"Thank you for talking some sense into my colleague, Lord Captain. We will send this man back to where the Tech-Priests found him and retrieve the augment when the time comes."
"Thank you for talking some sense into my colleague, Lord Captain. We will send this man back to where the Tech-Priests found him and retrieve the augment when the time comes."

languages.text: 「私の同僚に、道理を説いてくれたこと、ありがとうございます。この男はテクプリストが彼を発見した場所に戻し、その時が来たら増幅器を取り戻します」
languages.original_text: "Thank you for talking some sense into my colleague, Lord Captain. We will send this man back to where the Tech-Priests found him and retrieve the augment when the time comes."

traits.locale_text: 「私の同僚に、道理を説いてくれたこと、ありがとうございます。この男はテクプリストが彼を発見した場所に戻し、その時が来たら増幅器を取り戻します。」

languages.text: "Meslektaşımın aklını başına getirdiğiniz için teşekkürler Lord Kaptan. Bu adamı, Tekno Rahiplerin onu bulduğu yere geri göndereceğiz ve zamanı geldiğinde ogmenti alacağız."
languages.original_text: "Thank you for talking some sense into my colleague, Lord Captain. We will send this man back to where the Tech-Priests found him and retrieve the augment when the time comes."

traits.locale_text: "Meslektaşımın aklını başına getirdiğiniz için teşekkürler Lord Kaptan. Bu adamı, Tekno Rahiplerin onu bulduğu yere geri göndereceğiz ve zamanı geldiğinde ogmenti alacağız."

languages.text: «Gracias por hacer que mi colega entre en razón, Lord Capitán. Devolveremos al hombre adonde lo encontraron los tecnosacerdotes y recuperaremos el aumento cuando llegue el momento».
languages.original_text: "Thank you for talking some sense into my colleague, Lord Captain. We will send this man back to where the Tech-Priests found him and retrieve the augment when the time comes."

traits.locale_text: «Gracias por hacer que mi colega entre en razón, Lord Capitán. Devolveremos al hombre adonde lo encontraron los tecnosacerdotes y recuperaremos el aumento cuando llegue el momento».

languages.text: “感谢您让我的同事恢复了理智，舰长大人。我们会把此人送回技术神甫发现他的地方，等时候到了再回收植入物。”
languages.original_text: "Thank you for talking some sense into my colleague, Lord Captain. We will send this man back to where the Tech-Priests found him and retrieve the augment when the time comes."

traits.locale_text: “感谢您让我的同事恢复了理智，舰长大人。我们会把此人送回技术神甫发现他的地方，等时候到了再回收植入物。”

languages.text: « Merci d'avoir fait entendre raison à mon collègue, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Nous allons renvoyer cet homme là où les technoprêtres l'ont trouvé, puis nous récupérerons ses augmentations le moment venu. »
languages.original_text: "Thank you for talking some sense into my colleague, Lord Captain. We will send this man back to where the Tech-Priests found him and retrieve the augment when the time comes."

traits.locale_text: « Merci d'avoir fait entendre raison à mon collègue, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Nous allons renvoyer cet homme là où les technoprêtres l'ont trouvé, puis nous récupérerons ses augmentations le moment venu. »

languages.text: "Danke, dass Ihr meinen Kollegen zur Vernunft gebracht habt, Lord Captain. Wir werden diesen Mann dahin zurückbringen, wo die Techpriester ihn gefunden haben, und die Augmentation zu gegebener Zeit zurückholen."
languages.original_text: "Thank you for talking some sense into my colleague, Lord Captain. We will send this man back to where the Tech-Priests found him and retrieve the augment when the time comes."

traits.locale_text: "Danke, dass Ihr meinen Kollegen zur Vernunft gebracht habt, Lord Captain. Wir werden diesen Mann dahin zurückbringen, wo die Techpriester ihn gefunden haben, und die Augmentation zu gegebener Zeit zurückholen."
